title: Winter Premier League/2025
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Winter Premier League 2025}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Winter Premier League 2025 |tickername=Winter Premier League 2025 |shortname=2025 |image=Winter Premier League 2025 allmode.png |imagedark=Winter Premier League 2025 allmode.png |icon=Winter Premier League 2025 icon allmode.png |icondarkmode=Winter Premier League 2025 icon allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series= |organizer=4TR Official |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/4tr_official |sponsor=TTFA Academy |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=400000 |country=India |sdate=2025-12-09 |edate=2025-12-11 |rulebook= |twitter= |facebook= |instagram=4tr_official |youtube=@4TR_official |web= |discord= }} ==About== * '''Group Stage:''''' December 1st - 3rd, 2025 ** 64 teams,3 matchdays. *** 32 qualified teams. *** 32 invited teams. *** Each group will play 6 matches. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 team from each group (Total 48 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' December 4th - 5th, 2025 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 team from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' December 6th - 8th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 12 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' December 9th - 11th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=180000|{{Opponent|Welt Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=100000|{{Opponent|Genesis Esports (Indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=50000|{{Opponent|Team Roman}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|GodLike Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Hexe Gaming}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Rising Esports (Indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Higgboson Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Meta Ninza}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Sinewy Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Rapid Chaos Esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Team Eggy}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Team Versatile}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Gods Reign}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|blitz esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|The Knight Mobs}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|Jux Esports}} }} |adjacentContent= {{AwardPrizePool|exchangeinfo=false |{{Slot|award=MVP |localprize=30000 |{{Opponent|Proton|flag=in|team=Welt Esports}} }} |{{Slot|award=Fan Fav.
